name: Seasoning for Polish Kielbasa-Fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill meat to 32-34°F before starting.
2. Grind the meat through a 1/4" or 3/8" plate.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the meat and mix well.
4. Stuff the mixture into 35-38mm hog casings.
5. Package and chill or freeze as soon as possible.
